extra.reason: Fix merged in Session 13: parametric Mandelstam{T} + evaluate_numeric. Tests pass in test_ee_ww_grozin.jl.

Stage C implemented. eνW vertex fixed (γ^μ P_L convention). Full gauge cancellation works: σ drops from 222→10 pb at 500 GeV. Grozin match: 2% at 170 GeV, residual at high energy from eeZ γ5 ordering (feynfeld-pyi).
eeZ γ5 fix + WWZ coupling sign: exact Grozin match (ratio=1.0) at all energies
eeZ γ5 fix + WWZ coupling sign: exact Grozin match (ratio=1.0) at all energies
Phases A-C complete: LoopChannel, build_loop_box_amplitude, spin_sum_tree_loop_interference, TID (rank 0/1/q² done, rank-2 product deferred to feynfeld-544)
Rank-2 TID complete. B₀(0,0,0) now falls back to COLLIER b0_coli_ (dim-reg). All 33 interference terms evaluate. Full box integral finite at all kinematics.

Phase E+F complete: evaluate_box_channels + born_virtual_box with 63 tests. Im(I_COLLIER) gives box/Born ~ O(α/π), F-B symmetric. Full FeynCalc comparison deferred to when triangles+CTs are available.

Acceptable for current scope: all 7 existing processes use (:p1,:p2,:k1,:k2). Adding configurability would violate 'no hypothetical future requirements' principle. Error message is clear. Will extend naturally when 2→3 or different naming is needed.
Fixed: added _try_expand(::Eps) method that expands MomentumSum slots by linearity. ε(αK₁+βK₂, b, c, d) = α ε(K₁,...) + β ε(K₂,...)
Removed dsigma_dt_ee_ww (ew_cross_section.jl) and sigma_total_compton_massless (cross_section.jl). Neither was exported or referenced.
Extracted _splookup + _Kdot overloads to sp_lookup.jl (32 LOC). tid.jl now 175 LOC (was 202).

Existing test/v2/test_diagram_gen.jl already tests against golden-master counts and supports adding new RED tests inline (first RED added: phi3 2L=465). A future issue can add a full manifest-driven harness iterating all 102 cases, but the per-test TDD the user requested is unblocked without it.

Phase 1 skeleton complete. src/v2/qgraf/{QgrafPort.jl, types.jl} (170 LOC, under 200). Partition, EquivClass, FilterSet, TopoState + helpers. 89/89 unit tests green. No regression in existing 31-test suite. Review agent running in background.

canonical.jl delivered. 35 unit tests for _lex_next!, next_class_perm!, compute_equiv_classes!, _compare_permuted_adjacency, is_canonical_full!, is_canonical_feynman all green. Full-perm check replaces pairwise-swap bug. Integrated via topology_filter.jl delegate; 32/32 diagram_gen tests green including phi3 2L=465.

REGRESSION FIXED: phi3 φφ→φφ 2-loop now yields 465 (was 474). is_canonical_feynman uses degree-only equivalence classes + FULL S_n permutation check (qg21 labels 77/93/102/202/204) replacing old pairwise-swap. Lex-smallest convention matches topology_enum's descending fill. Wired via topology_filter._is_canonical_topo delegate. 32/32 diagram_gen tests green; 133/133 qgraf unit tests green. feynfeld-ney (Strategy C full port) remains open for subsequent phases (Step A/B row-fill, field assignment, routing, filters, fermion sign, symmetry).
Multi-gen QED delivered. qed1_model() / qed_model() / qed3_model() in src/v2/model.jl. Unlocked 9+ golden-master cases (qed1 γ→γ 1L, e→e 1L, all tree qed1; qed3 τ variants).

Hypothesis disproven in Session 21 investigation: qgraf qed1 model file (refs/qgraf/v4.0.6/qgraf-4.0.6.dir/q4fc/models4/qed) does NOT use external= or notadpole= keywords. The apparent excess in QED 1-loop all counts was simply because we were running qed1 cases against our 2-gen qed_model() — fixed by adding qed1_model().

Strategy C port shipped. src/v2/qgraf/ has 15 files ~3,583 LOC implementing recursive-descent qg21+qg10+qgen+qdis+canonical+audition per qgraf-4.0.6.f08 citations. Per stocktake 04: 95/104 golden masters pass (9 remaining = specific filter ports + 2 known FAIL); those gaps are tracked in specific beads: feynfeld-8du7 (Phase 14 filters: qumpi/qumvi/qgsig/qcyc), feynfeld-ejl (1-gen QED 13 non-1PI loop tests), feynfeld-rff (3-gen QED), feynfeld-sia (filter predicates), feynfeld-wjw (4-point QCD gggg), feynfeld-jzg (QCD ghosts). P0 umbrella closes in favor of child beads.

Phase 18a bridge shipped (10 commits f4563bb..cd39db4, per memory phase-18a-bridge): solve_tree_pipeline ≡ solve_tree symbolic equality for ee→μμ tree massless (test/v2/qgraf/test_phase18a_pipeline.jl, test_solve_tree_pipeline.jl). Pipeline: route_momenta → compute_amap → build_propagators/vertices/externals → walk_fermion_lines → emission_to_amplitude. Extension to full tree SM tracked in epic feynfeld-xa7s (Phase 18b, 8 sub-tasks).

Architectural supersession: v2 chose direct trace-product |M|² (spin_sum_amplitude_squared in src/v2/spin_sum.jl; evaluate_m_squared in cross_section.jl) rather than FormCalc FF/FFC/Mat separation. Bhabha |M|² test in test_bhabha.jl. The FormCalc pattern may be reconsidered in the 'reimagining' phase if genuinely needed.

Architectural supersession: v2 does direct SU(N) colour algebra (colour_types.jl, colour_simplify.jl, colour_trace.jl) rather than FormCalc ColourME. Tests in test_colour.jl (27 tests). The FormCalc pattern may be reconsidered in the 'reimagining' phase if needed.

Architectural supersession (REVISED note in ntj epic): v2 uses per-sector dispatch models (QED, EW, QCD) not a unified SM Lagrangian extraction. Vertex correctness is validated per-sector via MUnit ports + pipeline tests (test_pipeline.jl, test_ee_ww.jl, test_ee_mumu_x.jl, test_compton.jl, test_bhabha.jl). Deferred unified SM validation can be re-created post-reimagining if needed.

Architectural supersession: v2 uses per-sector dispatch models (model.jl QED, ew_model.jl, qcd_model.jl, phi3_model.jl) rather than a unified SM Lagrangian. Sufficient for spirals 8-10 scope per ntj epic REVISED note. BSM/unified-SM DSL deferred to spiral 11+ and would warrant fresh scoping in the reimagining phase.
